author: gb9t
content: Iter 72 result: drivers/md/dm-cache.md (block cache target - dm-cache-target.c ~3612 + dm-cache-metadata.c ~1827 + dm-cache-policy-smq.c ~1960; per-target Cache + DmCacheMetadata + SMQ stochastic-multi-queue policy + bio_prison per-block + writeback/writethrough/passthrough modes + per-cblock dirty-bit + bg writeback worker + dm-bufio for metadata persistence) + virt/kvm/x86-vmx-lbr.md (Intel Last-Branch-Record virtualization - in pmu_intel.c; per-vCPU lbr_desc + x86_pmu_lbr records cap + MSR_LBR_FROM/_TO/_INFO/_TOS pass-through via MSR-bitmap + DEBUGCTLMSR.LBR-tied enable/disable + perf_event_create_kernel_counter for LBR-watchdog + VM-entry/exit MSR auto-load/save). 94 Tier-3s total. Next iter: drivers/md/raid10.md (RAID-10 multi-disk parity) + virt/kvm/x86-svm-ibs.md (AMD Instruction-Based-Sampling).
